policy_context: 5. 協助工友安裝幸福工友App，並向工友講解幸福工友App應用，包括行為安全之星、安全評核及個人違反地盤安全守則保證書等； > 6. 工友填寫的上述資料涉及個人隱私，所有資料不得外洩。 > 附件
nearby_paragraphs: I have never worked in a hot environment or have not worked in a hot environment for more than a month
本人已有兩星期至一個月時間沒有在酷熱環境中工作
I have not worked in a hot environment for two weeks to one month.(是/否)

I consent to the Safety Officer conducting this declaration and assessment which has been explain to me in my mother tongue. I declare that all the information provided by me in this form is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
本人確定安全主任在進行此調查時已向我清楚解釋內容，並確定所提供的資料正確無誤。
If the Worker is Aged 60 or Above, Sub-contractor Supervisor Should Declare Worker’s Job (Tick the Appropriate Box) **to be completed by Sub-contractor Supervisor 由分判商打理人填寫**
如工友年齡在60歲或以上，分判商打理人應申報其工作內容(請選適當方格)
